trends.label: real
trends.title: AI Agent 生态持续扩展
trends.text: 多 agent、工具调用、浏览器操作等方向正在从 demo 走向生产

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 视频生成竞赛加速
trends.text: 多家公司发布视频生成模型，质量和速度都在快速提升

trends.label: watch
trends.title: Benchmark 刷新频率加快
trends.text: 模型性能天花板持续提升，但实际应用差距仍待验证

trends.label: real
trends.title: 多模态成为标配
trends.text: 文本、图像、音频、视频的统一处理能力越来越普遍

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 监管政策收紧
trends.text: 全球多地出台 AI 相关法规，合规成本上升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 替代一切的叙事
trends.text: AI 在特定任务上表现优异，但通用替代仍需时间

cover.title: SWE-WebDevBench: Evaluating Coding Agent Application Platforms as Virtual Software Agencies
cover.summary: The emergence of "vibe coding" platforms, where users describe applications in natural language and AI agents autonomously generate full-stack software, has created a need for rigorous evaluation…
cover.why_it_matters: SWE-WebDevBench 正在改变写代码的方式——速度和质量都在跃升
cover.content_angle: 用 SWE-WebDevBench 完成一个实际任务，录屏发帖「AI 写代码 vs 人写代码」

cover.title: CreativityBench: Evaluating Agent Creative Reasoning via Affordance-Based Tool Repurposing
cover.summary: Recent advances in large language models have led to strong performance on reasoning and environment-interaction tasks, yet their ability for creative problem-solving remains underexplored. We study…
cover.why_it_matters: CreativityBench 让 AI 从「回答问题」进化到「自动干活」，效率提升是量级的
cover.content_angle: 录制 CreativityBench 自动完成任务的过程，发帖「AI 自动化实操演示」

cover.title: KinDER: A Physical Reasoning Benchmark for Robot Learning and Planning
cover.summary: Robotic systems that interact with the physical world must reason about kinematic and dynamic constraints imposed by their own embodiment, their environment, and the task at hand. We introduce…
cover.why_it_matters: KinDER 降低了定制模型的门槛，小团队也能训练专属 AI
cover.content_angle: 写 KinDER 的微调教程，发帖「手把手教你训练自己的 AI 模型」

cover.title: Diffusion Model as a Generalist Segmentation Learner
cover.summary: Diffusion models are primarily trained for image synthesis, yet their denoising trajectories encode rich, spatially aligned visual priors. In this paper, we demonstrate that these priors can be…
cover.why_it_matters: Diffusion Model as a… 降低了视觉内容创作门槛，非设计师也能做出专业素材
cover.content_angle: 拿 Diffusion Model as a… 生成一组作品截图，发帖「AI 做的图/视频能到什么水平了」

cover.title: APEX: Large-scale Multi-task Aesthetic-Informed Popularity Prediction for AI-Generated Music
cover.summary: Music popularity prediction has attracted growing research interest, with relevance to artists, platforms, and recommendation systems. However, the explosive rise of AI-generated music platforms has…
cover.why_it_matters: APEX 提升了 AI 获取和使用外部知识的能力，准确率更高了
cover.content_angle: 用 APEX 搭一个简单知识库 demo，发帖「10 分钟搭建 AI 知识助手」
